name: property-value-broker-correction-wins
rationale: Broker initial intake states property_value $700,000. Appraisal doc shows $700,000. Broker corrects mid-thread to $735,000 (refreshed appraisal from second valuator). F1.PV canonical-map resolves to broker_correction value; appraisal source is shadowed. Tests broker_correction tier winning for property_value field.
notes: Two-event sequence. Tests F1.PV resolution analogously to A01's F1.LA test.
